name: lyra-de-slop
description: Behavior-preserving removal of AI-generation artifacts from code (narration comments, any-casts, dead code, debug statements, defensive theater, over-abstraction, over-nesting) and prose (AI-register docs, emoji headers, padded changelogs). Diff-scoped by default, typecheck+test verified. Composes with lyra-clean-code and lyra-bug-hunter.
